author: phase-4-coordinator
content: Operator overloading complete in ferray-core/src/ops.rs. Implements Add/Sub/Mul/Div/Rem/Neg for all ownership combinations (&Array op &Array, owned op owned, owned op &Array, &Array op owned), scalar variants (Array op T), and Neg. 19 tests passing. Note: this implementation requires same-shape arrays — broadcasting tracked separately as #346. Closing #43 as completed.
